sections.paragraph: with suff. פָּתְהֵז Isa 3:17 pl. פֹּתֹות interstice, space between, Arab. فَوْتُ, from فات VI. to stand apart from one another. (It sometimes follows the analogy of verbs ע֞ע, sometimes ע֞ו as in Arabic). Specially used of the space between the feet, i.e. pudenda muliebria, Isa. loc. cit. Figuratively פֹּתֹות the hollowed parts of hinges, 1Ki 7:50.
